creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to crypt47 from comment #18)
#GP is general protection fault in Intel terminology.

All of the stack traces go through icmp_error().  ip_output() is transmitting a valid-looking mbuf, but when control flow reaches bridge_transmit(), we have a different, trashed mbuf.  I'd guess that the problem is in a packet filter, it seems you have pf and ipfw both loaded.

There's a large diff between 12.2 and 13.0 in that code.  Would you be willing to share your rulesets somehow?
